candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; only revenue-related candidate and clearly represents total revenue/sales.
This is clearly a direct production cost and the only COGS-like candidate provided.
Core SG&A-type personnel costs; appears as operating overhead rather than COGS.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A line provided.
Mixed bucket but closest remaining overhead-type line; allowed as SG&A component when more precise SG&A lines are absent.

candidates.row_label: Other operating cash flow incl currency exchange
candidates.why: Cash flow classification, not an income statement expense component; should NOT be used for SG&A components.

variables.notes: Two similar 'Salaries and personnel expenses' rows appear in the preview, but only one generic label is in the candidate list; that candidate is selected once.
No R&D-related candidate rows provided; treat XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Primary income statement interest expense line; best representation of gross interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; valid secondary interest expense source.
Represents allocation of net profit, not interest; should not be used for XINT.
Represents non-controlling interest share of comprehensive income, not interest expense.
Represents profit allocation to controlling shareholders, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Profit to controlling interests excl extritems
candidates.why: Profit allocation excluding extraordinary items, not interest expense.
Same nature as profit to controlling interests; not interest expense.
Represents controlling interest share of comprehensive income, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest; good fallback if primary lines are missing.
Cash flow representation of interest expense; good fallback when income statement interest is unavailable for some periods.
Interest income (negative of expense direction in CF); not appropriate for XINT which seeks expense.
Equity transaction with minorities; unrelated to interest expense.
Cash flow measure of interest expense; strong alternative/fallback for XINT in cash terms.
Dividends to minorities, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of interest in a subsidiary from non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Equity transaction, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list so later processing can take the first available interest expense measure per year.

candidates.why: Income from associates, not a balance sheet equity total.

candidates.row_label: Proft to equity holder of parent from discontinuing operations
candidates.why: Profit allocation, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of fixed assets/equity inestments
candidates.why: Cash flows from asset sales, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of shares and other equity instruments
candidates.why: Equity-related cash inflow, but not the level of book equity.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of shares and equity investments
candidates.why: Investment cash outflow, not total equity.

variables.notes: No candidate corresponds to total shareholders’ equity; BE is not identifiable from the provided candidate list.

candidates.why: Explicit line for profit attributable to non-controlling interests; best proxy for minority interest-related income share.
Line labeled for minority interests in comprehensive income; strong secondary proxy for MIB flows.
Represents controlling shareholders, not minorities.

candidates.row_label: Profit to controlling interests excl extritems
candidates.why: Same as above, excluding extraordinary items; not minority interest.
Represents controlling interests, not minorities.
Transaction with minorities in equity, not the minority interest balance itself.
Dividends to minorities (a flow), not the balance of minority interest; secondary relevance at best.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of interest in a subsidiary from non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Equity transaction with minorities; not the minority interest balance.

variables.notes: Using income statement allocations to non-controlling interests as the best available proxies for MIB from the provided candidates.
